metadata.description: Publish docs, JSON explorers, datasets, visual explainers, and multi-page Spaces to Emberflow from Claude Code

plugins.name: ember-publish
plugins.description: Publish content to Emberflow — automatically picks the right format (document, JSON explorer, or Space) based on your content

plugins.name: ember-publish-doc
plugins.description: Publish a markdown document with emberDiagrams to Emberflow for hosted viewing with comments

plugins.name: ember-publish-json
plugins.description: Publish JSON data to Emberflow as an interactive explorer with expand/collapse, search, and multi-payload tabs

plugins.name: ember-publish-dataset
plugins.description: Publish CSV files to Emberflow as an interactive dataset viewer with search, sort, filter, pagination, and CSV export

plugins.name: ember-publish-explainer
plugins.description: Generate an interactive visual explainer — AI chooses the best visualization (flowchart, chart, timeline, grid, etc.) for the topic

plugins.name: ember-publish-space
plugins.description: Publish a directory of markdown files as an Emberflow Space — a multi-page docs site with sidebar navigation

plugins.name: ember-manage
plugins.description: Manage your Emberflow account and content — list docs, folders, spaces, check auth status, delete or move documents
